title: santalodes multiflorum
intro: Santalodes multiflorum, also known as sandalwood tree or yellow sandalwood, is a small evergreen tree native to Australia, commonly recognized for its aromatic properties. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. Its health benefits include wound healing, skin issues, and stress relief, as well as acting as an antiseptic to treat infections and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Santalodes multiflorum include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used in aromatherapy, perfumery, and traditional medicine.
